category.scope_note: Hand-held, transportable, and garden electric and cordless power tools exported from China to Sri Lanka, covering electrical safety, EMC, SLSI national conformity and SLS marking, noise handling, RoHS-style substance controls, and battery/radio obligations for cordless models.

title.en: China-to-Sri-Lanka Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入斯里兰卡：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入斯里蘭卡：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China power-tool compliance against Sri Lanka SLSI national conformity, SLS marking, electrical safety, EMC, noise handling, substance controls, and battery and radio requirements for cordless tools.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动工具合规与斯里兰卡 SLSI 国家符合性、SLS 标志、电气安全、电磁兼容、噪声处理、物质管控以及无绳工具的电池和无线电要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動工具合規與斯里蘭卡 SLSI 國家符合性、SLS 標誌、電氣安全、電磁相容、噪聲處理、物質管控以及無繩工具的電池和無線電要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body assessment, customs determination, market-access approval, or product-safety design review. Exporters and importers should verify current Sri Lanka law, SLSI certification and import-inspection practice, adopted SLS and IEC standards, TRCSL radio requirements, and destination-country enforcement with qualified professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、海关裁定、市场准入批准或产品安全设计评审。出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格专业人士核验现行斯里兰卡法律、SLSI 认证与进口检验实践、采用的 SLS 与 IEC 标准、TRCSL 无线电要求及目的国执法情况。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、海關裁定、市場准入批准或產品安全設計評審。出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格專業人士核驗現行斯里蘭卡法律、SLSI 認證與進口檢驗實務、採用的 SLS 與 IEC 標準、TRCSL 無線電要求及目的國執法情況。

answer_first.en: For China-made electric or cordless power tools entering Sri Lanka, the practical baseline is SLSI national certification and import inspection against adopted SLS and IEC 62841 safety standards, the SLS mark where required, electrical safety suited to a 230 V 50 Hz grid, EMC control, and TRCSL type approval for the radio module in cordless tools; an EU-style outdoor-noise product-marking regime does not apply in Sri Lanka, so noise is treated as an occupational and design factor rather than a separate marking duty.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的有线或无绳电动工具进入斯里兰卡，实务基线是按采用的 SLS 与 IEC 62841 安全标准完成 SLSI 国家认证和进口检验、在需要时加贴 SLS 标志、电气安全适配 230 V 50 Hz 电网、控制电磁兼容，并对无绳工具的无线电模块取得 TRCSL 型号核准；斯里兰卡不存在欧盟式户外噪声产品标识制度，因此噪声被视为职业与设计因素，而非单独的标识义务。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的有線或無繩電動工具進入斯里蘭卡，實務基線是按採用的 SLS 與 IEC 62841 安全標準完成 SLSI 國家認證和進口檢驗、在需要時加貼 SLS 標誌、電氣安全適配 230 V 50 Hz 電網、控制電磁相容，並對無繩工具的無線電模組取得 TRCSL 型號核准；斯里蘭卡不存在歐盟式戶外噪聲產品標識制度，因此噪聲被視為職業與設計因素，而非單獨的標識義務。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set true. Official regulator, standards body, conformity-assessment body, customs, or primary legal sources are preferred; local PDFs are not accepted.
